paper_title: MedBLINK: Probing Basic Perception in Multimodal Language Models for Medicine
benchmark_description: A benchmark designed to probe basic perceptual capabilities in multimodal language models for medicine
task_selection: Chosen in consultation with a senior radiologist
task_focus: Perceptually simple but clinically meaningful tasks
key_finding: Models struggle with basic perceptual tasks, revealing a fundamental gap in current evaluation protocols
significance: Models must master low-effort perceptual tasks before being trusted for diagnostic reasoning
title: MedBLINK: Probing Basic Perception in Multimodal Language Models for Medicine
